title: My Biome Is So Beautiful
description: Sometimes just admiring the scenery is a joy in itself
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b15daa8814d1bc02f6136b5163d91abef9e56359.png)
# Sometimes just admiring the scenery is a joy in itself

### _This is my first time creating a modpack, centered around biomes and decorative elements._

![bridge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4f4a426adca4f25842ba0e47d186d6a551f4290_0.webp)

_I love enjoying the scenery in Minecraft, so I created this modpack, which includes many beautiful biomes and terrains, along with numerous decorative mods._

![blue](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02211c6f1a9973fb661dbb6dc8ea67b84e8be17b_0.webp)

_The overall gameplay stays true to the vanilla style. I hope you all like it~_

![lily](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b1b0c8d0b74e7f5bb531ae534711c4efc1dbc91_0.webp)

## Features of the modpack:
- A vast variety of biomes and terrains
- Stress-free vanilla survival gameplay
- Most monsters have become passive. Enjoy the night!
- Addition of interesting little creatures
- Beautiful decorative blocks for building
- Immersive natural soundscapes
- Detailed rain effects with enhanced visuals
- Emote animations for players
- Farming, cooking, and a cozy lifestyle experience
- A few mysterious Easter eggs
- And much more!

![ice](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/253af6632ee01b545fcd81b146e86fcb56574a54_0.webp)
